question: The 10 most populated countries in the world
description: As of 2024, name the 10 countries with the largest populations. Position 1 is the most populated.

question: The 10 longest rivers in the world
description: Name the 10 longest rivers in the world by total length. Position 1 is the longest.

question: The first 10 Marvel Cinematic Universe films in release order
description: Name the first 10 MCU films in the order they were released in cinemas. Position 1 is the first film released.

question: The 10 largest London boroughs by area
description: Name the 10 largest London boroughs by total area. Position 1 is the largest.

aliases: London Borough of Richmond upon Thames

question: The 10 largest countries in the world by area
description: Name the 10 largest countries in the world by total land area. Position 1 is the largest.

question: The 10 tallest mountains in the world
description: Name the 10 tallest mountains in the world by height above sea level. Position 1 is the tallest.

question: The last 10 winners of the FIFA Men's World Cup
description: Name the countries that won the last 10 FIFA Men's World Cup tournaments, starting from the most recent. Position 1 is the most recent winner.

question: The first 10 elements of the periodic table
description: Name the first 10 elements of the periodic table by atomic number. Position 1 is element number 1.

question: The 8 planets and 2 best-known dwarf planets in order from the Sun
description: Name the 8 planets of the solar system and the 2 most well-known dwarf planets (Ceres and Pluto), in order from closest to furthest from the Sun. Position 1 is the closest.

question: The 10 most-streamed songs on Spotify of all time
description: As of 2025, name the 10 most-streamed songs on Spotify by total cumulative streams. Position 1 is the most streamed.

question: The 10 largest cities in the world by city proper population
description: Ranked by population of the city proper (municipal administrative area), not the wider metro area or urban agglomeration, using widely cited recent official/UN-style estimates. Position 1 is the most populous city proper. Answer with the city name.

question: The 10 largest islands in the world by area
description: Ranked by total island area, excluding continents. Position 1 is the largest island by area. Answer with the island name.

question: The 10 largest deserts in the world by area
description: Ranked by total desert area, including polar deserts. Position 1 is the largest desert by area. Answer with the desert name.

question: The 10 largest lakes in the world by surface area
description: Ranked by surface area. Position 1 is the largest lake by area. Seas traditionally classified as lakes in geography, such as the Caspian Sea, are included. Answer with the lake name.

question: The 10 most populous U.S. states
description: Ranked by resident population using recent U.S. Census estimates. Position 1 is the most populous state. Answer with the state name.

question: The 10 highest waterfalls in the world
description: Ranked by total height of the waterfall drop system. Position 1 is the tallest waterfall. Answer with the waterfall name.

question: The 10 largest oceans and seas by area
description: Ranked by surface area, combining the world's five oceans with the next-largest widely recognized seas. Position 1 is the largest by area. Answer with the ocean or sea name.

question: The first 10 presidents of the United States in order
description: Position 1 is the earliest person to serve as President of the United States. Give the president's commonly used name in chronological order of first taking office.

question: The first 10 Roman emperors in order
description: Position 1 is the earliest ruler generally recognized as Roman emperor, starting with Augustus in 27 BCE. Give the emperor's standard English name in chronological order of accession.

question: The last 10 prime ministers of the United Kingdom
description: Position 1 is the most recent person to become Prime Minister of the United Kingdom, counted by most recent first appointment to the office. Use names as of the cutoff date April 2026.

question: The 10 largest empires in history by land area
description: Position 1 is the empire that reached the greatest land area at its peak. Use the commonly accepted empire name, based on approximate maximum territorial extent.

question: The first 10 men to walk on the Moon
description: Position 1 is the earliest person to set foot on the Moon. Give astronauts in chronological order of first stepping onto the lunar surface.

question: The 10 deadliest wars in history by estimated total deaths
description: Position 1 is the war with the highest commonly cited estimated total deaths, including military and civilian deaths where standard historical estimates do so. Because estimates vary, answers are based on widely accepted approximate rankings.

answers.answer: Conquest of the Qing dynasty by the Ming dynasty

question: The first 10 Nobel Peace Prize laureates in award order
description: Position 1 is the earliest Nobel Peace Prize award recipient, starting in 1901. List individual laureates or organizations in chronological order by award year; for years with multiple winners, use the order shown here.

question: The 10 largest planets and dwarf planets in the Solar System by mass
description: Position 1 is the most massive known planet or dwarf planet in the Solar System. Answers should be the object's common English name.

question: The 10 hottest planets and dwarf planets in the Solar System by mean surface temperature
description: Position 1 is the object with the highest average surface temperature, using standard modern planetary data. Answers should be the object's common English name.

question: The 10 most abundant elements in Earth's crust by mass
description: Position 1 is the element that makes up the greatest percentage by mass of Earth's crust, using standard geochemistry references. Answers should be element names.

question: The 10 brightest stars in the night sky as seen from Earth
description: Position 1 is the star with the greatest apparent brightness in Earth's night sky, ranked by apparent visual magnitude. Answers should be the star's common name.

question: The 10 fastest animals by top recorded speed
description: Position 1 is the animal with the highest reliably cited top speed, combining flight, diving, and running records commonly used in zoology references. Answers should be common animal names.

question: The 10 minerals of the Mohs hardness scale in order from hardest to softest
description: Position 1 is the hardest standard mineral on the Mohs scale and position 10 is the softest. Answers should be mineral names.

question: The 10 nearest stars to the Sun
description: Position 1 is the closest star to the Sun, counting individual stars rather than star systems, using standard modern distance measurements. Answers should be common star names.

description: Ranked by total Olympic gold medals won in Summer and Winter Games combined, as of the end of the Paris 2024 Olympics. Position 1 is the athlete with the most gold medals. Answers should be athlete names.

description: Ranked by total men's singles titles won at the Australian Open, French Open, Wimbledon, and US Open, as of the end of the 2024 season. Position 1 is the player with the most titles. Answers should be player names.

description: Ranked by total women's singles titles won at the Australian Open, French Open, Wimbledon, and US Open, as of the end of the 2024 season. Position 1 is the player with the most titles. Answers should be player names.

description: Ranked by total Formula One World Drivers' Championship titles won, as of the end of the 2024 season. Position 1 is the driver with the most titles. Answers should be driver names.

description: Ranked by total points scored in NBA regular-season games, as of the end of the 2024-25 regular season. Position 1 is the player with the most points. Answers should be player names.

description: Ranked by total individual Tour de France stage victories, as of the end of the 2024 Tour de France. Position 1 is the rider with the most stage wins. Answers should be cyclist names.

description: Ranked by estimated total record sales worldwide across albums and singles, using widely cited industry estimates; position 1 is the highest-selling artist. Answers should be artist names.

description: Ranked by total competitive Grammy Awards won in career totals; position 1 is the artist with the most wins. Use artist names. Totals reflect the standard all-time ranking widely cited after the 2024 Grammy Awards.
